title: melicytus orarius
intro: Melicytus orarius, also known as the New Zealand matipo, is a shrub or small tree native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Staphyladaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Melicytus orarius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
